headline: Morgan Stanley adjusts Applied Materials stock price target pre-earnings
summary: There is a quiet confidence in Morgan Stanley's latest note on Applied Materials. Not the loud kind that makes bold promises. The measured kind that says, "We have seen this before, and we think we know how it ends." The bank raised its price target on Applied Materials (AMAT) to $454 from $432, ...

headline: Humanoid Robots to Drive Next Leg of China Export Dominance
summary: (Bloomberg) -- China’s early lead in humanoid robots will help power the next phase of its global manufacturing and export dominance, according to new research from Morgan Stanley.
